subject: Purchase agreement ready for your review
snippet: Purchase agreement ready for your review. The revised agreement reflects the signed figure.
body: Natalie, the revised purchase agreement reflects the agreed figure in the signed offer letter. Call once you have read it.

subject: Fundraiser headcount and catering
snippet: Confirmed headcount holding. Catering final plate count invoiced.
body: Confirmed headcount is holding steady. Motown Catering invoiced the final plate count. We may need a few extra seats if walk-ins show.

subject: Down payment and cash position
snippet: Before committing a down payment, reconcile shop accounts.
body: Before you commit to a down payment, let us reconcile the shop accounts so you know exactly what is liquid.

subject: Donor acknowledgements pending
snippet: Corporate donors waiting on thank you notes.
body: Several corporate donors are waiting on thank you notes. List attached in the shared drive.

subject: Optional dessert table for the dinner
snippet: Dessert table add-on quoted at 450.00 dollars
body: Natalie, we can add a full dessert table to the fundraiser dinner service for a flat 450.00 dollars. Let us know whether to add it before we finalise the order. Awaiting your go ahead.
